tsTroubleshooting.domains: (topic tsTroubleshooting) (topic hi-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic ut-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic sw-d) (topic ui-d) (topic oce-d) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c tsTroubleshooting oceTroubleshooting-c)
tsTroubleshooting.title: 270001 Make sure all printhead valves are open

abstract.p: This ORE is reported to prevent burst of ink tubes due to closed ink valves at the printhead carriage after installation or replacement of a printhead. This ORE is a reminder to check whether all ink valves are open. If all ink valves are checked, this ORE can be resolved.

note.p: After printhead installation or replacement this ORE will be reported as soon as the printheads became warm. After reporting this ORE, the printheads will start cooling down again. Waiting a long time before resolving the ORE (checking the valves), will result in a long warm up time to get the engine in standby again.

tsDiagnose.p: Visually check all ink valves on printhead carriage.
